source_pr.title: exectuor: fix data race in test

symptoms: exectuor: fix data race in test
failure_signature: exectuor: fix data race in test
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to a Go data race in the test helper client: the `syncLog` flag was read in `SendReq` while being toggled by the test without synchronization, triggering race-detector failures. This PR stabilizes the test by moving `syncLog` under the existing mutex and reading it under RLock before comparing with request flags.
fix_pattern: Protect shared test-helper state with synchronization (move mutable flags under mutex/atomic; read under lock) to prevent race-detector flakes.

evidence: evidence: exectuor: fix data race in test
